    "Physical damper positions do not match the certified TAB balance report settings",
    "System is operating out of design airflow tolerance due to incorrect damper alignment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-align and adjust dampers to match the specified TAB report setpoints",
    "Lock damper quadrants in place and mark correct positions on the ductwork",
    "Re-verify airflow measurements at affected terminals"
  ],
  "rationale": "A mismatch between physical damper positions and the certified TAB report indicates the system is not balanced to design specifications, which can cause improper pressurization, comfort complaints, and energy waste. Because the work is at the rough-complete stage, this must be corrected before final sign-off.",
